notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior chapter 148, comprised of section 2501 et seq., relating to defense industrial base, was repealed, except for sections 2504 to 2507, by , , . Sections 2504 to 2507 of that chapter were renumbered sections 2531 to 2534, respectively, of this chapter by . Sections 2531 and 2532 of this title were subsequently transferred to subchapter I of chapter 385 of this title and renumbered as sections 4851 and 4852, respectively, by , , . Sections 2533, 2533a, 2533b, and 2534 of this title were subsequently transferred to subchapter II of chapter 385 of this title and renumbered as sections 4861 to 4864, respectively, by , , . was subsequently transferred to subchapter III of chapter 385 of this title and renumbered as section 4872 by , , , as amended by , , .
